a with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus 7 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus n k with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top space d a n space b with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space 2 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus 3 k with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top
